generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#

instance MQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MABIMAX100Encoder, MABIMAX100CurrentSensor
]

instance MABIMAX100Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuating motor for precise motion control in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

    base:desc "Gearbox component transmitting torque in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

    base:desc "Encoder sensor for measuring output angle in MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTStream
]

instance MABIMAX100CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring input current to robot motors",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTStream
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100Motor, MABIMAX100Gearbox, MABIMAX100Encoder, MABIMAX100CurrentSensor
]

instance PositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of output angles from MABI MAX 100 robot encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTStream
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of input current to robot motors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTStream
]

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization of live measurements from the physical system to the digital shadow via one-way data flow, ensuring continuous state representation without feedback to the physical system, as defined by Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) defines a concrete architecture with Processing (consuming and producing data traces), Model (digital representation), and Asset (physical system interface) components, where data flows from Asset to Processing for aggregation and abstraction before being processed by the Model component."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for sensor data transmission between physical and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards such as SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], and MontiArc [25], [26] for architecture description and systems modeling. These standards enable interoperability through component & connector perspectives and support integration of diverse stakeholders [31]."
]
